segments.text: [Music]
introducing Enterprise features for
ccloud single senton authentication
through SEL delivers increased Security
in a single source of Truth for user
authentication and
authorization using saml we cover
Microsoft entra OCTA as well as other
providers this allows users and your
Enterprise to connect through your
company centralized identity provider
and automatically be assigned the right
access
and introducing Enterprise hierarchy the
ability to group my organizations under
an Enterprise independently from my
devops platform this helps larger
Enterprises with multiple organizations
by delivering a way to efficiently
manage these as an Enterprise owner I am
able to manage its permissions as a
member of an organization I'm able to
see a list of the organizations within
Enterprise that I have access to Center
Cloud allows you to create portfolios of
products that spend the whole Enterprise
[Music]
this allows you to group products
meaningfully and will enable reporting
which provides a summary view including
ratings for the portfolio allowing you
to then dig into which project is
leading to any low
ratings management reporting delivering
the ability to generate reports that
describe the state of code at the
product and portfolio
level plus the option to subscribe to
and be emailed project reports in PDF
format organizational wide configuration
onboarding many projects is a tedious
process and Center Cloud enables easier
onboarding with onetime setup applied to
all subsequent projects via config
defaults projects can follow a standard
or gu configuration avoiding manual
effort per project instead grouping
effort discover the new Enterprise
features for sonarcloud today visit
son.com to request a demo or contact
your account manager
[Music]

fullText: [Music] introducing Enterprise features for ccloud single senton authentication through SEL delivers increased Security in a single source of Truth for user authentication and authorization using saml we cover Microsoft entra OCTA as well as other providers this allows users and your Enterprise to connect through your company centralized identity provider and automatically be assigned the right access and introducing Enterprise hierarchy the ability to group my organizations under an Enterprise independently from my devops platform this helps larger Enterprises with multiple organizations by delivering a way to efficiently manage these as an Enterprise owner I am able to manage its permissions as a member of an organization I'm able to see a list of the organizations within Enterprise that I have access to Center Cloud allows you to create portfolios of products that spend the whole Enterprise [Music] this allows you to group products meaningfully and will enable reporting which provides a summary view including ratings for the portfolio allowing you to then dig into which project is leading to any low ratings management reporting delivering the ability to generate reports that describe the state of code at the product and portfolio level plus the option to subscribe to and be emailed project reports in PDF format organizational wide configuration onboarding many projects is a tedious process and Center Cloud enables easier onboarding with onetime setup applied to all subsequent projects via config defaults projects can follow a standard or gu configuration avoiding manual effort per project instead grouping effort discover the new Enterprise features for sonarcloud today visit son.com to request a demo or contact your account manager [Music]
